allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\), len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(open\('all-unified.json'\)\); print\(type\(d\), len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('d:\\Yanis\\Desktop\\projet_code\\aoe4-matchup-master1\\src\\data\\all-unified.json'\)\); data.units.filter\(u => u.classes && u.classes.includes\('mercenary_byz'\)\).forEach\(u => console.log\(\\`id: \\\\\\`\\${u.id}\\\\\\`, classes: [\\${u.classes.map\(c => \\`\\\\\\"\\${c}\\\\\\"\\`\).join\(', '\)}]\\`\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./src/data/all-unified.json'\); const dr = data.data.find\(u => u.id === 'desert-raider'\); console.log\('civs:', JSON.stringify\(dr.civs\)\); console.log\('classes:', JSON.stringify\(dr.classes\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./src/data/all-optimized_tec.json'\); const t = data.data.find\(u => u.id === 'local-knowledge'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(t, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('src/data/all-unified.json'\)\); [print\(v['age'],w['speed'],w['durations']['winddown'],w['durations']['reload']\) for u in data for v in u.get\('variations',[]\) for w in v.get\('weapons',[]\) if u.get\('id'\)=='mangudai']")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/all-optimized_tec.json'\); const t = d.find\(x => x.id === 'chivalry'\); console.log\('effects:', JSON.stringify\(t?.effects\)\); console.log\('var effects:', JSON.stringify\(t?.variations?.[0]?.effects\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/all-optimized_tec.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(d\); const arr = d[keys[0]]; const t = arr.find\(x => x.id === 'chivalry'\); console.log\('effects:', JSON.stringify\(t?.effects?.slice\(0,2\)\)\); console.log\('var0 effects:', JSON.stringify\(t?.variations?.[0]?.effects?.slice\(0,2\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/all-optimized_tec.json'\); console.log\(typeof d, Array.isArray\(d\), Object.keys\(d\).slice\(0,3\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/all-optimized_tec.json'\).data; const t = d.find\(x => x.id === 'chivalry'\); console.log\('effects:', JSON.stringify\(t?.effects\)\); console.log\('var0 effects:', JSON.stringify\(t?.variations?.[0]?.effects?.slice\(0,1\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./src/data/all-unified.json'\); const unit = data.find\(u => u.id === 'earls-guard'\); if\(unit\) { console.log\('classes:', JSON.stringify\(unit.classes\)\); console.log\('civs:', unit.civs\); const v3 = unit.variations?.find\(v => v.age === 3\); const v4 = unit.variations?.find\(v => v.age === 4\); if\(v3\) { console.log\('age3 classes:', JSON.stringify\(v3.classes\)\); console.log\('age3 weapons:', JSON.stringify\(v3.weapons?.map\(w => \({name:w.name,type:w.type,dmg:w.damage,speed:w.speed}\)\)\)\); } if\(v4\) { console.log\('age4 weapons:', JSON.stringify\(v4.weapons?.map\(w => \({name:w.name,type:w.type,dmg:w.damage,speed:w.speed}\)\)\)\); } } else console.log\('not found'\);")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./src/data/all-unified.json'\); const unit = data.find\(u => u.id === 'earls-guard'\); if\(unit\) { console.log\('classes:', JSON.stringify\(unit.classes\)\); const v3 = unit.variations && unit.variations.find\(v => v.age === 3\); const v4 = unit.variations && unit.variations.find\(v => v.age === 4\); if\(v3\) { console.log\('age3 classes:', JSON.stringify\(v3.classes\)\); v3.weapons && v3.weapons.forEach\(w => console.log\('age3 weapon:', w.name, w.type, 'dmg:', w.damage\)\); } if\(v4\) v4.weapons && v4.weapons.forEach\(w => console.log\('age4 weapon:', w.name, w.type, 'dmg:', w.damage\)\); } else console.log\('not found'\);")

Bash(node -e "const raw = require\('./src/data/all-unified.json'\); const data = Array.isArray\(raw\) ? raw : Object.values\(raw\).flat\(\); const unit = data.find\(u => u.id === 'earls-guard'\); if\(unit\) { console.log\('classes:', JSON.stringify\(unit.classes\)\); const v3 = unit.variations && unit.variations.find\(v => v.age === 3\); const v4 = unit.variations && unit.variations.find\(v => v.age === 4\); if\(v3\) { console.log\('age3 classes:', JSON.stringify\(v3.classes\)\); v3.weapons && v3.weapons.forEach\(w => console.log\('weapon:', w.name, w.type, 'dmg:', w.damage\)\); } } else { const keys = Object.keys\(raw\); console.log\('keys:', keys.slice\(0,5\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./src/data/all-optimized_tec.json'\); const tech = data.find\(t => t.id === 'steeled-arrow'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(tech?.effects?.slice\(0,3\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./src/data/all-optimized_tec.json'\); const techs = Object.values\(data\).flat\(\); const tech = techs.find\(t => t.id === 'steeled-arrow'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(tech?.effects?.slice\(0,3\), null, 2\)\);")
